purpose: Auto-loaded (user-invocable: false) skill providing the master orchestrator's core identity, constraints, and schemas. Contains: 5 NON-NEGOTIABLE constraints (master never writes code, all implementation dispatched, dashboard mandatory, long prompts mean MORE planning, read command file every time); 5 responsibilities (Gather Context/Plan/Dispatch/Status/Report); allowed-files table (plan.json, initialization.json, logs.json, master_state.json, metrics.json); NEVER list (no .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx/.py/.css/.html, no app commands, no 'just one thing'); Module Index (10 referenced docs with when-to-read); compact dashboard write schemas (initialization.json/logs.json/master_state.json/metrics.json); dashboard selection priority (assigned > --dashboard flag > ask user, NEVER scan); Eager Dispatch 5-step mechanism; Approval Gate protocol (hook-enforced via validate-approval-gate.sh); 12-row Common Pitfalls table; 11-rule summary.
gotchas: Auto-loaded for master-orchestrator agent — provides identity AND schemas
References agent/master/initialization_blueprint.md as MANDATORY pre-read before writing initialization.json
Lists exactly 3 documented exceptions to initialization.json write-once: repair task creation, circuit breaker replanning, !add_task
Approval Gate is hook-enforced — agent CANNOT bypass via clever prompting
Plan.json must be written BEFORE initialization.json — also hook-enforced
Mentions legacy paths (tasks/{date}/parallel_*.json) as REMOVED — current canonical is dashboards/{id}/plan.json
patterns: Auto-load protocol skill: identity + schemas + module index in one file
NON-NEGOTIABLE blockquote pattern for the 5 hardest rules
Compact schema reference (not full schema — points to blueprint for that)
conventions: Section ordering: identity -> constraints -> responsibilities -> allowed -> never -> module index -> schemas -> rules
